emotional_tone: Competent, elite, precise, and highly technical with an editorial edge.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for sections. Min-h-screen for hero.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for Projects and About Stats. Gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetry preferred.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned mostly. Terminal aesthetic requires left-aligned text mimicking CLI output.

surface_strategies.hero_background: Retro-Futurism: Grid borders in background using CSS linear-gradients to create a subtle #1A1A1A mesh on #030303.
surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders and Tracing Beam. Flat #0A0A0A background with 1px #1A1A1A border. Hover states introduce #00E5FF glow or border tint.
surface_strategies.admin_dashboard: Control Room Grid. Sharp edges. 1px solid borders. Maximum density, pure functional (Swiss High Contrast).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links: text color turns to #00E5FF, slight translate-y. Projects cards: border color changes to cyan-500/50, image scales up slightly.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Custom cursor (cyan dot). Typewriter effect for terminal text in Hero.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary CTA: bg-primary text-black font-mono font-bold hover:bg-white transition-colors. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_primary hover:border-primary hover:text-primary.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-none text-white.
components.tags: Small, font-mono, border border-border text-text_secondary px-2 py-1 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider.

project_2.description: Data center server racks in dark lighting

project_3.description: Silhouette of a programmer coding in dark room

project_4.description: Close-up of laptop displaying code in dimly lit room

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JavaScript (.js/.jsx) exclusively; do not use TypeScript.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-btn').
Install 'framer-motion' for animations, specifically typewriter effects in the hero terminal.
Do not use generic Inter font. Import Outfit (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), and JetBrains Mono (monospace).
Ensure the design embraces the terminal/CLI metaphor where appropriate, but maintains a sophisticated editorial look. Avoid cheesy aesthetics.
Implement a custom cursor, smooth scrolling (Lenis), and micro-interactions on hover.
Admin dashboard must use 'Control Room' dense UI, without rounded corners.
The Projects section should utilize a Tetris Bento Grid.
NEVER use placeholder text for images; strictly rely on the provided media URLs.
